name: Aarotonia Rising
short_description: This game is a 2D platformer with varying speeds, sometimes is fast paced and sometimes it's normal paced. In this game, you will play as a heroic, yet also really socially dead hero known as, "Ripper 99" and her friends(Sometimes) and go on wild adventures!
detailed_description: Aarotonia Rising is a 2D platformer game where you play as a Cyborg Adventurer named, "Ripper 99"(And sometimes you will play as her buddies) and you get to go on a lot of different and wild adventures with the End Goal of ending Lord Nexus's terror over all of Aarotonia! (Oh, and I guess over those 25,000 multiverses that he conquered... I guess). Though it looks like that won't be your only problem... Try to escape him, try to RUN from him. He will chase you, he will hunt you, and if you're not careful enough, he will KILL you! Try not to let the Man From Limbo catch you, or you WILL become his dinner. (ALSO DISCLAIMER: You can only play this game with a Keyboard And Mouse) (Sorry I felt like I had to put that there!)
